Introduction
    Ye Xi had fantasies about the martial arts world when she first entered the world. she didn't get that human being could be evil. Bai Yue saved her. With his help, she wiped out the evil people and become a true hero.

Filming locations: Hengdian World Studios, Dongyang, Jinhua, Zhejiang Province, China
